subject: (no subject)
body:
Hi, tried calling went to vm - weather is not good here today - overcast and raining FYI - does not look like good flying weather for you...
Send you quotes etc for the blinds for PB..should I have him fedex the samples to the island or just let him choose?
Also PB is as done as possible right now - couple of things you won't like but I don't know how best to deal with is exposed wires from tv's and computers and lamps w/out shades..tv's on floors as no furniture to put them on..
Call me so we can discuss




Thx

G
